data.title: Add read-after-write consistency test for bash-native write_commit_event
data.description:
## Task
In tests/scripts/test-ticket-write-commit-event.sh, add test_write_commit_event_read_after_write that: (1) creates a ticket, (2) adds an event via write_commit_event, (3) immediately runs ticket show <id> and ticket list and verifies the new event appears (no stale .cache.json state). Testing mode: GREEN.

## Story
29e5-0a74 — remediation from completion-verifier FAIL
